preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN '${KAFKA_DB_NAME}' IS NOT NULL AND '${KAFKA_DB_NAME}' != '' AND '${KAFKA_DB_USERNAME}' IS NOT NULL AND '${KAFKA_DB_USERNAME}' != '' AND '${KAFKA_DB_SCHEMA}' IS NOT NULL AND '${KAFKA_DB_SCHEMA}' != '' AND '${KAFKA_DB_PASSWORD}' IS NOT NULL AND '${KAFKA_DB_PASSWORD}' != '' AND exists (SELECT 1 FROM pg_extension WHERE extname = 'dblink') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

SELECT CASE WHEN '${KAFKA_DB_NAME}' IS NOT NULL AND '${KAFKA_DB_NAME}' != '' AND '${KAFKA_DB_USERNAME}' IS NOT NULL AND '${KAFKA_DB_USERNAME}' != '' AND '${KAFKA_DB_SCHEMA}' IS NOT NULL AND '${KAFKA_DB_SCHEMA}' != '' AND '${KAFKA_DB_PASSWORD}' IS NOT NULL AND '${KAFKA_DB_PASSWORD}' != '' AND exists (SELECT 1 FROM pg_extension WHERE extname = 'dblink') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

SELECT CASE WHEN '${RABBITMQ_DB_NAME}' IS NOT NULL AND '${RABBITMQ_DB_NAME}' != '' AND '${RABBITMQ_DB_USERNAME}' IS NOT NULL AND '${RABBITMQ_DB_USERNAME}' != '' AND '${RABBITMQ_DB_SCHEMA}' IS NOT NULL AND '${RABBITMQ_DB_SCHEMA}' != '' AND '${RABBITMQ_DB_PASSWORD}' IS NOT NULL AND '${RABBITMQ_DB_PASSWORD}' != '' AND exists (SELECT 1 FROM pg_extension WHERE extname = 'dblink') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

SELECT CASE WHEN '${RABBITMQ_DB_NAME}' IS NOT NULL AND '${RABBITMQ_DB_NAME}' != '' AND '${RABBITMQ_DB_USERNAME}' IS NOT NULL AND '${RABBITMQ_DB_USERNAME}' != '' AND '${RABBITMQ_DB_SCHEMA}' IS NOT NULL AND '${RABBITMQ_DB_SCHEMA}' != '' AND '${RABBITMQ_DB_PASSWORD}' IS NOT NULL AND '${RABBITMQ_DB_PASSWORD}' != '' AND exists (SELECT 1 FROM pg_extension WHERE extname = 'dblink') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

SELECT CASE WHEN '${MAIL_DB_NAME}' IS NOT NULL AND '${MAIL_DB_NAME}' != '' AND '${MAIL_DB_USERNAME}' IS NOT NULL AND '${MAIL_DB_USERNAME}' != '' AND '${MAIL_DB_PASSWORD}' IS NOT NULL AND '${MAIL_DB_PASSWORD}' != '' AND '${MAIL_DB_SCHEMA}' IS NOT NULL AND '${MAIL_DB_SCHEMA}' != '' AND exists (SELECT 1 FROM pg_extension WHERE extname = 'dblink') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

SELECT CASE WHEN '${SCHEDULER_DB_NAME}' IS NOT NULL AND '${SCHEDULER_DB_NAME}' != '' AND '${SCHEDULER_DB_USERNAME}' IS NOT NULL AND '${SCHEDULER_DB_USERNAME}' != '' AND '${SCHEDULER_DB_PASSWORD}' IS NOT NULL AND '${SCHEDULER_DB_PASSWORD}' != '' AND '${SCHEDULER_DB_SCHEMA}' IS NOT NULL AND '${SCHEDULER_DB_SCHEMA}' != '' AND exists (SELECT 1 FROM pg_extension WHERE extname = 'dblink') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
